hero.title: Your ideas. Printed in your colors.
hero.subtitle: Configure finished designs in your favorite colors — or upload your own 3D model and receive an individual quote.

configure.title: Configure
configure.text: Pick a product and compose your color combination live in 3D.

print.title: Print
print.text: We print on Bambu Lab machines with brand filament.

ship.title: Ship
ship.text: Delivery in 3–5 business days, free from €150.

manufacturingNotice.title: Manufacturing note
manufacturingNotice.production: Each ammunition box is manufactured using the 3D printing process. Slight layer lines or minimal surface variations are production-related and typical of additive manufacturing. They do not constitute a defect and have no effect on function, stability, or durability.
manufacturingNotice.ammunition: The ammunition shown in the product images is for illustration purposes only and is not included in the offer.

viewer.hint: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom

voucherReason.not_yet_valid: This voucher is not valid yet
voucherReason.exhausted: This voucher has already been fully redeemed

success.title: Thank you for your order!
success.emailHint: We sent you an order confirmation by email.

upload.title: Print your own model
upload.subtitle: Upload your 3MF or STL file (max. 50 MB). We review it and send you an individual quote.
upload.name: Name
upload.termsContent: I confirm that I hold the necessary rights to the uploaded model, will not upload unlawful content or content infringing third-party rights, and understand that files will not enter production before the quote review.
upload.successText: We will review your model and get back to you with a quote by email.

consent.title: Cookies & privacy
consent.text: We use necessary cookies to run the shop. Statistics and marketing cookies are only loaded with your consent.
consent.necessaryText: Required for cart, checkout and language settings.
consent.statisticsText: Google Analytics 4 — helps us improve the shop.
consent.marketingText: Meta Pixel — for more relevant ads.

legal.placeholder: Placeholder — add legal content before going live.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Questions about your order, payment or a product? We are happy to help.
support.name: Name
support.subject: Subject
support.orderNumberHint: If your request relates to an order, add the order number from your confirmation email.
support.successText: We sent you an email with the link to your ticket. Your ticket number:

ticket.title: Support ticket
ticket.closedNote: This ticket is closed. Please create a new request if you have further questions.

home.title: 3D Print Shop — Custom 3D prints in your colors
home.description: Configurable 3D-printed products with live color preview, upload your own models & get a quote. Free shipping from €150.

products.description: All 3D-printed products at a glance — colors fully configurable with a live 3D preview in your browser.

cart.title: Cart
cart.description: Your cart at the 3D Print Shop — shipping €6.99, free from €150.

upload.title: Upload your model
upload.description: Upload an STL or 3MF file and receive an individual quote for your 3D print.

support.title: Support
support.description: Questions about your order, payment or shipping? Open a support ticket — we reply by email.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Complete your order — pay by card, bank transfer or Bitcoin.

legal.description: Legal information about the 3D Print Shop.

error.notFoundText: This page does not exist or has been removed.

portal.title: My account area
portal.noOrders: There are no orders for this email address.

request.title: Access your orders
request.intro: Enter your email address and we will send you a secure link to your orders.
request.confirmation: If orders exist for this email, we have sent an access link.
request.error: The access link could not be requested. Please try again.
request.privacy: The link is valid for 30 days and is only sent to the address provided.

expired.title: Access link expired
expired.intro: This link has expired. Request a new one.

form.title: Open a complaint
form.missingContext: No valid order reference. Please open the complaint from your account area.
form.customMadeNote: Note: personalised made-to-order items are excluded from the right of withdrawal. Complaints about defects and goodwill cases are of course still possible.
form.noItems: Please select at least one item.
form.descriptionTooShort: Please describe the problem (at least 10 characters).
form.submitError: The complaint could not be sent.

view.replyIntro: We need more details. Please reply below.

availability.unavailable: {zone}: the selected colour is no longer available
availability.out_of_stock: {zone}: the selected colour is currently out of stock
